details: The agent successfully navigated to the Wikipedia article, used scripts to extract all co-laureates for each year, and reported complete and accurate results for the 3 most recent years (2025, 2024, 2023). The 2024 and 2023 results match the known facts exactly. The 2025 data (Clarke, Devoret, Martinis) was read directly from the page and all co-laureates were included for each year.
